title: oenothera deltoides subsp. deltoides
intro: Oenothera deltoides subsp. deltoides, also known as Evening Primrose, is a biennial or perennial plant native to North America, characterized by its yellow, fragrant flowers that bloom in the evening and wilt by morning. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its rich content of omega-6 fatty acids, specifically gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), which has anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Evening Primrose include relief from menstrual cramps, eczema, and skin conditions, as well as support for cardiovascular health and immune function. Evening Primrose can be prepared as an herbal supplement, oil, or tea, and is often used to promote overall well-being and soothe various health issues.
